```{r}
#Loading the required packages and functions

library(tidyverse)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(patchwork)
library(png)
library(grid)
library(gridGraphics)
source("functions.R")
```

```{r}
#Loading the datsets

seds_data <- read.csv("complete_seds.csv")%>% tolow()
fuel_codes <- read_excel("Codes_and_Descriptions.xlsx",
                    sheet = "Fuel codes") %>% tolow() 
Coefficients <- readRDS("coefs-2025.rds")
State_boundaries <-readRDS("usstate1.rds")
Req_states<-c("GA","TN","CA","TX","US")
Req1_states<-c("GA","TN","CA","TX")
```

```{r}
#Filtering the data to pull data of only required states and creating seperate columns for fuelcode, sector code, units  from msn codes.

seds <- seds_data %>%
  filter(statecode %in% Req_states ) %>%
  mutate(
    fuelcode = mid(msn, 1, 2),
    sector   = mid(msn, 3, 4),
    units    = mid(msn, 5, 5)
  ) %>%
  left_join(fuel_codes, by = c("fuelcode" = "fuel"))
```

```{r}
#Filtering further data of only electric sector from previously filtered data

seds_EI_B <- seds %>%
  filter(sector == "EIB") %>%
  mutate(Quads= data / (10**6)) 

seds_EI_B<-seds_EI_B[seds_EI_B$data>0,] #Removing zeros value rows
latest_year <- max(seds_EI_B$year, na.rm = TRUE) # created latest year=2023 variable to later use in plotting data only for that particular year
```

```{r}
# Creating dataset for calculating the share of various fuels used in electricity sector

elec_source_share <- seds_EI_B %>%
  group_by(statecode, year) %>%
  mutate(
    total_quads = sum(Quads, na.rm = TRUE),
    share        = Quads / total_quads
  )%>% ungroup()
elec_source_share1 <- elec_source_share[elec_source_share$fuel_description!="Total energy",] #Removed rows with fuelcode as Total energy

```

```{r}
ggplot(
  elec_source_share1 %>% filter(statecode %in% Req_states),
  aes(x = year, y = share, colour = fuel_description)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ statecode, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title  = "Electricity primary energy mix: Georgia vs Selected states and  U.S.",
    x      = "Year",
    y      = "Share of selected fuels",
    colour = "Fuel"
  )
```
```{r}
ggplot(
  elec_source_share1 %>% filter(statecode %in% Req_states),
  aes(x = statecode, y = share, fill = fuel_description)
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Primary energy mix(fuels) of electricity sector from 1990-2023 "),
    x     = "Selected States vs U.S.",
    y     = "Share of each fuels",
    fill  = "Fuel"
  )
```

```{r}
latest_fuel_mix <- elec_source_share %>%
  filter(year == latest_year) %>%
  select(statecode, fuel_description, share) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from  = fuel_description,
    values_from = share
  )

```

```{r}

Fuel_plot<-ggplot(
  elec_source_share1 %>% filter(year == latest_year),
  aes(x = statecode, y = share, fill = fuel_description)
) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    title = paste("Primary energy mix(fuels) of electricity sector in ",latest_year),
    x     = "Selected states vs U.S.",
    y     = "Share of selected fuels",
    fill  = "Fuel"
  )
ggsave("Fuel plot-2023.png",Fuel_plot,width = 9,height = 6,dpi=300)
```

```{r}
#Calculating the CO2 emissions in MMT

seds2 = seds_EI_B %>% 
  left_join(Coefficients) %>% mutate(emimmt = coef*Quads)
seds2 <- seds2[is.na(seds2$emimmt)=="FALSE",]
```

```{r}
#Calculating the total amount of emisssion per state per year

Total_GHG_emis <- seds2 %>%
  group_by(statecode, year) %>%
  summarize(
    Total_emis= sum(emimmt, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

otal_GHG_emis1 <- seds2 %>%
  group_by(statecode, year) %>%
  summarize(
    Total_emis= sum(emimmt, na.rm = TRUE)
  )
```
```{r}
ggplot(data=Total_GHG_emis) +
  geom_line(aes(year,Total_emis,col=statecode),lwd=1.1)+labs(x="Year",y="Total emissions",title="Yearly progession in Total CO2 emissions of Georgia,Texas,Tenesse,Calfornia vs US from 1990-2023(in MMT)")
```

```{r}
#Creating a datset to plot seperate graphs to compare each selected state and US with Georgia

Compare_codes <-c("TN","TX","CA","US")
compare<-function(st){Total_GHG_emis%>%filter(statecode %in%c("GA",st))%>%mutate(panel=st)}
Compare_with_GA <- map_dfr(Compare_codes,compare)
```


```{r}
ggplot(
  Compare_with_GA,
  aes(x = year, y = Total_emis, colour = statecode)
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ panel, ncol = 1) +
  labs(
    title  = "CO2 emissions in Electricity sector from 1990-2023: Georgia vs selected states and US",
    x      = "Year",
    y      = "Million metric tons CO2",
    colour = "Geography"
  )

```


```{r}
#Calculating the emissions per person/capita

popm_data <-seds_data %>% 
  filter(msn == "TPOPP") %>% 
  mutate(popm = data/10**3) %>% 
  select(statecode,year,popm)

pop_mil <- Total_GHG_emis%>%left_join(popm_data)%>% 
  mutate(emimtpercap = Total_emis/popm)
```
```{r}
per_capita<-ggplot(data=pop_mil) +
  geom_line(aes(year,emimtpercap,col=statecode),lwd=1.1)+labs(x="Year",y="Emission per capita",title = "CO2 Emission Per Captia of US vs Georgia,Tenesse,Texas,California (1990-2023)")
ggsave("Per_capita.png",per_capita,width = 10,height = 7,dpi=300)
```

```{r}
#Preparing dataset to map the reults

State_boundaries<-State_boundaries%>%rename(statecode=stusps)
map_GHG <-Total_GHG_emis[Total_GHG_emis$year=="2023",]
States_map <- State_boundaries %>% inner_join(map_GHG,by="statecode")
center<-st_centroid(States_map)
label_states <- center %>% filter(statecode %in% c("GA","TN","TX","CA"))
```

```{r}
emis1_2023 <- Total_GHG_emis %>%
  filter(year == 2023, statecode %in% Req1_states) %>%
  mutate(
    state_name = case_when(
      statecode == "GA" ~ "Georgia",
      statecode == "TN" ~ "Tennessee",
      statecode == "TX" ~ "Texas",
      statecode == "CA" ~ "California"
    )
  )
```

```{r}
bar_plot <- ggplot(
  emis1_2023 %>%
    mutate(state_name = fct_reorder(state_name, Total_emis)),
  aes(x = Total_emis, y = state_name, fill = statecode == "GA")
) +
  geom_col(width = 0.65, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = round(Total_emis, 1)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4.5,
    color = "grey20"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#7C3AED", "FALSE" = "#F26B4F")) +
  labs(
    title = "2023 Electricity-Sector CO2 Emissions",
    subtitle = "Georgia compared with Tennessee, Texas, and California",
    x = "Million metric tons CO2",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  expand_limits(x = max(emis1_2023$Total_emis) * 1.15) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, color = "grey10"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12, color = "grey40"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", color = "grey20"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(color = "grey35"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(color = "grey35"),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )
ggsave("2023_emissions.png",bar_plot,width=10,height=7,dpi=300)

```

```{r}
lower48 <- State_boundaries %>%
  filter(!statecode %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR"))

map_states <- lower48 %>%
  left_join(emis1_2023, by = "statecode")

center <- st_centroid(map_states)

label_states <- center %>%
  filter(statecode %in% Req1_states) %>%
  mutate(label = case_when(
    statecode == "GA" ~ "GA",
    statecode == "TN" ~ "TN",
    statecode == "TX" ~ "TX",
    statecode == "CA" ~ "CA"
  ))
```

```{r}
locator_map <- tm_shape(lower48) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "grey96",
    border.col = "grey85",
    lwd = 0.5
  ) +
  tm_shape(center %>% filter(statecode %in% Req1_states)) +
  tm_symbols(
    size = 0.45,
    col = "#F26B4F",
    border.col = "grey20",
    lwd = 0.6,
    alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  tm_shape(label_states) +
  tm_text(
    "label",
    ymod = -0.8,
    size = 0.65,
    col = "grey20"
  ) +
  tm_layout(
    frame = FALSE,
    bg.color = "white",
    inner.margins = c(0.05, 0.05, 0.05, 0.05)
  )
tmap_save(locator_map, "locator_map.png", width = 5, height = 3, dpi = 300)
img <- png::readPNG("locator_map.png")
map_plot <- ggplot() +
  annotation_raster(img, xmin = 0, xmax = 1, ymin = 0, ymax = 1) +
  theme_void()
final_infographic <- map_plot + bar_plot + plot_layout(widths = c(1.8, 2))
final_infographic
```


```{r}

  tmap_mode("plot")

# lower 48 only for cleaner framing
lower48 <- State_boundaries %>%
  filter(!statecode %in% c("AK", "HI", "PR"))

# selected states only for symbols
map_GHG <- Total_GHG_emis %>%
  filter(year == 2023, statecode %in% c("GA", "TN", "TX", "CA"))

states_map <- lower48 %>%
  left_join(map_GHG, by = "statecode")

center <- st_centroid(states_map)

label_states <- center %>%
  filter(statecode %in% c("GA", "TN", "TX", "CA")) %>%
  mutate(label = case_when(
    statecode == "GA" ~ "Georgia",
    statecode == "TN" ~ "Tennessee",
    statecode == "TX" ~ "Texas",
    statecode == "CA" ~ "California"
  ))

co2_map<-tm_shape(lower48, bbox = st_bbox(lower48)) +
  tm_polygons(
    col = "#BFDCEB",
    border.col = "grey85",
    lwd = 0.6
  ) +

  tm_shape(center) +
  tm_symbols(
    size = "Total_emis",
    col = "#F26B4F",
    border.col = "grey25",
    lwd = 0.7,
    fill_alpha = 0.9,
    size.max = 2.6,
    shadow=TRUE,
    title.size = "CO2 emissions (MMT)"
  ) +

  tm_shape(label_states) +
  tm_text(
    "label",
    just = "center",
    ymod = -0.9,
    size = 0.75,
    col = "grey20"
  ) +

  tm_layout(
    title = "Electricity-Sector CO2 Emissions, 2023",
    title.position = c("left", "top"),
    title.fontface = 2,
    title.size = 1.2,
    bg.color = "white",
    frame = FALSE,

    # tighter composition
    inner.margins = c(0.08, 0.03, 0.08, 0.03),

    # move legend inside map
    legend.outside = FALSE,
    legend.position = c("left", "bottom"),
    legend.bg.color = "white",
    legend.bg.alpha = 0.9,
    legend.frame = TRUE
  )
#tmap_save(co2_map,"CO2_emssions_map.png",width = 12,height = 6,dpi = 400)
#co2_map
```

```{r}
tmap_mode("plot")
tm_shape(State_boundaries)+tm_polygons(col = "grey90", border.col = "white")+tm_shape(States_map) +
  tm_fill(fill = "Total_emis",
          fill.scale = tm_scale_continuous(values = "-brewer.Spectral")) +

  tm_text("statecode") +
  tm_layout(
    title         = paste("CO2 Emissions by electricity sector in 2023(in MMT)"),
    title.position  = c("left", "top"),
    title.fontface=2,
    title.size      = 1,  
    inner.margins  = c(0.2, 0.02, 0.12, 0.02),
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position="Right",
    frame         = FALSE
  )
```

```{r}
# Aniamted map to display change in emissions from 1990 to 2023
States_map1<- State_boundaries %>% inner_join(Total_GHG_emis,by="statecode")

tmap_mode("plot")  

animated_map<- tm_shape(State_boundaries) +
  tm_polygons(
    col        = "grey90",
    border.col = "white",
    lwd        = 0.8
  ) +

  tm_shape(States_map1) +
  tm_polygons(
    col       = "Total_emis",
    palette   = "Spectral",        
    style     = "cont",
    title     = "mmt CO2"
  ) +
  tm_text(
    "statecode",
    just     = "center",
    ymod     = -0.6,
    size     = 0.7,
    col      = "grey20",
    bg.color = "white",
    bg.alpha = 0.6
  ) +


  tm_facets_wrap(
    by   = "year",
    nrow = 1,
    ncol = 1,
    free.coords = FALSE
  ) +
  tm_animate(fps=1)+

  tm_layout(
    title          = "CO2 Emissions by Electricity Sector(mmt) from 1990–2023",
    title.position = c("center", "bottom"),
    title.size     = 1.2,
    inner.margins  = c(0.2, 0.02, 0.12, 0.02),
    frame          = FALSE,
    legend.outside = TRUE,
    legend.outside.position = "bottom"
  )

tmap_animation(
  animated_map,
  filename = "Co2 emissions by year.gif",
  width    = 1200,
  height   = 700,
  loop     = TRUE
)


```
